glossaryEntries.definition: Deals periodic Fire Damage each round.

abilities.name: Shadowflame
abilities.rawDescription: Odd-numbered rounds: deal Physical Damage to one adjacent enemy, Damage Rate +125%; 20% chance to afflict the same target with Burn for two rounds.

notes: Mitigated by target Instinct.

activationRoll.description: Burn application chance after Shadowflame selects its Physical Damage target.

notes: Burn is periodic Fire Damage each round.

references.description: Burn uses the Physical Damage target.

abilities.name: Warrior's Zeal
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Daemoros Physical Damage Dealt +16%; Left Flank ally Instinct and Initiative +20.

notes: Uses the established Warrior's Zeal all-qualifying Physical source semantic inherited from Vermax.

glossaryEntries.definition: Deals periodic Tactical Damage to the target each round.

abilities.name: Instill Fear
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: one 25%-50% activation roll targets one enemy in any lane, preferring Right Flank; reduce Intelligence and Instinct by 25% enhanced by Strength and apply Panic for two rounds.

activationRoll.description: One successful activation applies all Instill Fear effects to one selected enemy.

references.description: Uses the enemy selected for the Intelligence reduction.

notes: Panic is periodic Tactical Damage each round.

references.description: Uses the enemy selected for the stat reductions.

abilities.name: Powerful Reflexes
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Daemoros Strength and Initiative.

glossaryEntries.definition: Control status: affected Command, Habit, and Basic Attack actions have a 50% chance to mistake allies and enemies.

abilities.name: Shroud of Shadows
abilities.rawDescription: Odd-numbered rounds: 15%-30% chance to afflict one adjacent enemy with Confusion for two rounds.

notes: On each affected Command, Habit, or Basic Attack action, Confusion has a separate 50% mistaken-side check; redirected target resolution is not simulated.

abilities.name: Darkening Fear
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: independently roll Instill Fear-like effects on one enemy in any lane, preferring Left Flank.

activationRoll.description: Darkening Fear has its own activation roll and target selection.

references.description: Uses the enemy selected for the Intelligence reduction.

notes: Panic is periodic Tactical Damage each round.

references.description: Uses the enemy selected for the stat reductions.

unresolvedQuestions: Mutual stacking and refresh behavior with Instill Fear.

abilities.name: Phantom's Veil
abilities.rawDescription: Start of each round until end of that round: reduce exactly one of Physical, Tactical, or Fire Damage Received. Selection method is not stated.

effectOptions.description: Exactly one defensive scope is selected; the selection method is unknown.

notes: Mitigated by target Instinct.

activationRoll.description: Burn application chance after Shadowflame selects its Physical Damage target.

notes: Burn is periodic Fire Damage each round.

references.description: Burn uses the Physical Damage target.

notes: Uses the established Warrior's Zeal all-qualifying Physical source semantic inherited from Vermax.

habits.name: Phantom's Veil
habits.rawDescription: Start of each round until end of that round: reduce exactly one of Physical, Tactical, or Fire Damage Received. Selection method is not stated.

effectOptions.description: Exactly one defensive scope is selected; the selection method is unknown.

notes: Daemoros command, trait, affinity, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from supplied screenshot evidence.
Phantom's Veil uses typed one-of effect options so Physical, Tactical, and Fire defenses are not derived as three simultaneous active modifiers.
Warrior's Zeal uses the established all-qualifying Physical source-scope semantic inherited from Vermax.
Observation values are account-specific and are not canonical base stats.
